goal: Add a side-effect-free consume preflight builder that validates a release-governance approved-action artifact is ready for later consumption while keeping action consume, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Authorized release-governance action artifacts can be preflighted for later consumption without consuming them.
Consume ref, consumer ref, and consume policy ref are required.
Action consume, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action consumption, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing consume ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-114 recorded a side-effect-free release-governance approved-action artifact without consuming it.
